html:
Exclusive to:

“A single card for playing games! Combine these together to make a deck.”

-

The Playing Card is an item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can be acquired from playing JIMBO's game. There are 52 cards in a deck, divided into four suits: Spades, Hearts, Diamonds, and Clubs. Each suit contains 13 cards: the numbers 2 through 10, plus four face cards — Ace (A), Jack (J), Queen (Q), and King (K).

When in the inventory, the player can right click a card to flip it. The player can hold one Playing Card onto another to stack them into a Deck Of Cards or to add it to an existing Deck.

It has no practical use.

Contents

  • 1 Deck Of Cards
  • 2 Tips
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Assets
  • 5 Gallery

Deck Of Cards

Exclusive to:

“Play a game of cards, however you like. Hit it to shuffle, but be careful!”

-

The Deck Of Cards is an item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It is a stack of Playing Cards. The player can add Playing Cards to a Deck of Cards or merge two Deck of Cards together.

When a Deck Of Cards is on the ground, the player can draw the topmost Playing Card from the deck or attack it to shuffle the cards. If it is attacked 10 times within 5.5 seconds, it will drop all the playing cards.

When in the inventory, the player can right click to flip the whole deck.

It has no practical use.

Tips

  • A Deck Of Cards can be used as a portable Punching Bag for Woodie's Weremoose, or the Bat Bat.
  • When A Deck Of Cards falls apart due to being attacked, it does not become a single playing card, but A Deck Of Cards containing only one Playing Card.
  • When A Deck Of Cards falls apart due to being attacked, the Playing Cards it drops are not the cards it contains itself, but new Playing Cards with random suits.

Trivia

  • The Playing Card and Deck Of Cards are added in A Royal Welcome for Jimbo update.
  • These cards are reference of French-suited playing cards.
  • JIMBO will give the player a Playing Card they don’t already have, making it easier to complete a full deck.

plainText:
Playing Card
Flipped
Revealed
Source
Dropped by
Miscellaneous
"playing_card"
Exclusive to:
“It's fifty-one short of a deck.”
–Wilson
“Must be the burn card.”
–Willow
“Don't worry little card, Wolfgang only rip in half full deck.”
–Wolfgang
“A single playing card. Great.”
–Wendy
“SOMEONE MISSING A CARD. I SHOULD DESTROY IT”
–WX-78
“Who's missing a card?”
–Wickerbottom
“Can't do much with that.”
–Woodie
“It is none other than the four of clubs!”
–Maxwell
“A wayward card.”
–Wigfrid
“Is this the one we lost?”
–Webber
“A lonely little card.”
–Warly
“Lost”
–Wormwood
“Somebody's not playin' with a full deck.”
–Winona
“Is it so hard to not lose a card?”
–Wortox
“Glurgh, who cheated?”
–Wurt
“Is THIS your card, Wobes?”
–Walter
“What does one do with a single card?”
–Wanda
“A single card for playing games! Combine these together to make a deck.”
-
The Playing Card is an item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can be acquired from playing JIMBO's game. There are 52 cards in a deck, divided into four suits: Spades, Hearts, Diamonds, and Clubs. Each suit contains 13 cards: the numbers 2 through 10, plus four face cards — Ace (A), Jack (J), Queen (Q), and King (K).
When in the inventory, the player can right click a card to flip it. The player can hold one Playing Card onto another to stack them into a Deck Of Cards or to add it to an existing Deck.
It has no practical use.

1 Deck Of Cards
2 Tips
3 Trivia
4 Assets
5 Gallery

Deck Of Cards
Small
Medium
Large
Single
Small

Miscellaneous
"deck_of_cards"
Exclusive to:
“Are we playing with a full deck?”
–Wilson
“If it's not a full deck, at least we have kindling.”
–Willow
“Rip deck of cards in half is one of Wolfgang famous feat of strength!”
–Wolfgang
“Suppose I can play Solitaire.”
–Wendy
“PRIMITIVE PASTIME”
–WX-78
“Do we have enough players for Bridge?”
–Wickerbottom
“No Lucy, you may not cut the deck. I know what you mean.”
–Woodie
“If only I stuck with these.”
–Maxwell
“Döst these cards bear a fell curse?”
–Wigfrid
“We know many games!”
–Webber
“Maman loved her cards.”
–Warly
“For play with friends”
–Wormwood
“Remember when you'd always knock down my house of cards?”
–Winona
“One sec, who shuffled this deck?”
–Wortox
“Go fish! Go fish! Florp!”
–Wurt
“Woby! Pick a card, any card!”
–Walter
“Certainly a way to kill time.”
–Wanda
“Play a game of cards, however you like. Hit it to shuffle, but be careful!”
-
The Deck Of Cards is an item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It is a stack of Playing Cards. The player can add Playing Cards to a Deck of Cards or merge two Deck of Cards together.
When a Deck Of Cards is on the ground, the player can draw the topmost Playing Card from the deck or attack it to shuffle the cards. If it is attacked 10 times within 5.5 seconds, it will drop all the playing cards.
When in the inventory, the player can right click to flip the whole deck.
It has no practical use.
Tips[edit | edit source]
A Deck Of Cards can be used as a portable Punching Bag for Woodie's Weremoose, or the Bat Bat.
When A Deck Of Cards falls apart due to being attacked, it does not become a single playing card, but A Deck Of Cards containing only one Playing Card.
When A Deck Of Cards falls apart due to being attacked, the Playing Cards it drops are not the cards it contains itself, but new Playing Cards with random suits.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Playing Card and Deck Of Cards are added in A Royal Welcome for Jimbo update.
These cards are reference of French-suited playing cards.
JIMBO will give the player a Playing Card they don’t already have, making it easier to complete a full deck.

title: Playing Card
wikitext:
{{Object Infobox
|image = Playing Card Dropped.png
|icon = <gallery>
Playing Card.png|Flipped
Playing Card2.png|Revealed
</gallery>
|droppedBy = {{Pic32|JIMBO}}
|spawnCode = "playing_card"
}}
{{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}}
{{Quotes
|wilson = It's fifty-one short of a deck.
|willow = Must be the burn card.
|wolfgang = Don't worry little card, Wolfgang only rip in half full deck.
|wendy = A single playing card. Great.
|wx78 = SOMEONE MISSING A CARD. I SHOULD DESTROY IT
|wickerbottom = Who's missing a card?
|woodie = Can't do much with that.
|maxwell = It is none other than the four of clubs!
|wigfrid = A wayward card.
|webber = Is this the one we lost?
|winona = Somebody's not playin' with a full deck.
|warly = A lonely little card.
|wortox = Is it so hard to not lose a card?
|wormwood = Lost
|wurt = Glurgh, who cheated?
|walter = Is THIS your card, Wobes?
|wanda = What does one do with a single card?
|choose = wilson
}}
{{Scrapbook Info|A single card for playing games! Combine these together to make a deck.}}
The '''Playing Card''' is an item exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It can be acquired from playing [[JIMBO]]'s game. There are 52 cards in a deck, divided into four suits: Spades, Hearts, Diamonds, and Clubs. Each suit contains 13 cards: the numbers 2 through 10, plus four face cards — Ace (A), Jack (J), Queen (Q), and King (K).

When in the inventory, the player can right click a card to flip it. The player can hold one Playing Card onto another to stack them into a [[#Deck Of Cards|Deck Of Cards]] or to add it to an existing Deck.

It has no practical use.
== Deck Of Cards ==
{{Object Infobox
|name = Deck Of Cards
|image = <gallery>
Deck Of Cards Dropped.png|Small
Deck Of Cards (Medium) Dropped.png|Medium
Deck Of Cards (Large) Dropped.png|Large
</gallery>
|icon = <gallery>
Deck Of Cards1.png|Single
Deck Of Cards2.png|Small
Deck Of Cards3.png|Medium
Deck Of Cards4.png|Large
</gallery>
|spawnCode = "deck_of_cards"
}}
{{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}}
{{Quotes
|wilson = Are we playing with a full deck?
|willow = If it's not a full deck, at least we have kindling.
|wolfgang = Rip deck of cards in half is one of Wolfgang famous feat of strength!
|wendy = Suppose I can play Solitaire.
|wx78 = PRIMITIVE PASTIME
|wickerbottom = Do we have enough players for Bridge?
|woodie = No Lucy, you may not cut the deck. I know what you mean.
|maxwell = If only I stuck with these.
|wigfrid = Döst these cards bear a fell curse?
|webber = We know many games!
|winona = Remember when you'd always knock down my house of cards?
|warly = Maman loved her cards.
|wortox = One sec, who shuffled this deck?
|wormwood = For play with friends
|wurt = Go fish! Go fish! Florp!
|walter = Woby! Pick a card, any card!
|wanda = Certainly a way to kill time.
|choose = wanda
}}
{{Scrapbook Info|Play a game of cards, however you like. Hit it to shuffle, but be careful!}}
The '''Deck Of Cards''' is an item exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It is a stack of Playing Cards. The player can add Playing Cards to a Deck of Cards or merge two Deck of Cards together. 

When a Deck Of Cards is on the ground, the player can draw the topmost Playing Card from the deck or attack it to shuffle the cards. If it is attacked 10 times within 5.5 seconds, it will drop all the playing cards.

When in the inventory, the player can right click to flip the whole deck.

It has no practical use.
{{clear}}

=={{Tips}} Tips ==
* A Deck Of Cards can be used as a portable Punching Bag for Woodie's Weremoose, or the Bat Bat.
* When A Deck Of Cards falls apart due to being attacked, it does not become a single playing card, but A Deck Of Cards containing only one Playing Card.
* When A Deck Of Cards falls apart due to being attacked, the Playing Cards it drops are not the cards it contains itself, but new Playing Cards with random suits.

=={{Trivia}} Trivia ==
* The Playing Card and Deck Of Cards are added in [[A Royal Welcome for Jimbo]] update.
* These cards are reference of [[Wikipedia:French-suited playing cards|French-suited playing cards]].
* JIMBO will give the player a Playing Card they don’t already have, making it easier to complete a full deck.

== {{Pic32|Research Notes}} Assets ==
